positive: A majestic, symmetrical celestial botanical pattern featuring glowing, stylized flora interwoven with abstract constellations. The style is detailed, neo-Art Deco mixed with bioluminescence watercolor, using deep indigo, vibrant teal, and gold foil accents. The composition must be centered, high contrast, and suitable for a repeating tile print on fabric. Focus on clean silhouettes, crystalline leaf structures, and gentle cosmic dust trails. Highly detailed line art, digital painting, volumetric light, 8k resolution.
negative: blurry, amateur, deformed, extra limbs, bad anatomy, out of frame, grainy, text, logo, watermark, signature, dirty, low resolution, noise, cartoon, photographic
